questions.q: At how many levels are you governed at the same time?
questions.explanation: You live under local, state, and national governments at once.

questions.q: Who represents you in the U.S. Senate?
questions.explanation: Each state has two U.S. senators.
Driver licenses are a state responsibility.

questions.q: Which office handles citizenship and green cards?
questions.explanation: USCIS handles naturalization and green cards.

questions.q: Why does local government often matter most to daily life?
options: It decides schools, roads, zoning, and local services close to home
questions.explanation: Local decisions directly shape everyday life.
